title: EU P2P Tunnel
description: A P2P tunnel that can be used for GTM energy transmission.
body:
EU P2P Tunnel

How to get this item?

You can now find it in the [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) Tab. In survival mode, you can use the [GTM](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtechceu-modern)'s wire or cable to right-click on any tunnel for attunement.

Specially, you need to install AE2 and GTM as the prerequisite of this mod.
